generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we're debating strategic autonomy, foreign actors are exploiting our open systems. My neighbor's son, a veteran, told me last week how his small-town emergency response team had to scramble when their outdated systems failed during a drill. Meanwhile, our 'allies' are laughing all the way to the bank selling us overpriced tech. We need to prioritize our own security - it's not just about being self-reliant, it's about being safe. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
